_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: Microglia were isolated from whole brains of male and female WT and Nf1± mice (12-16 weeks of age) by MACS using CD11b antibodies
resourceName: anti-mouse CD11b antibodies coupled to magnetic beads
details: Successfully isolated microglia from whole brains for proteomic analysis using MACS separation
